title: Gorillas - Return to Monke
description:
Replaces pandas with gorillas which fit right in with vanilla!
Optifine is required.
body:
## Reject modernity, return to MONKE.
**Replace your pandas with a vanilla styled gorilla using this pack!**

[Join my discord server!](https://discord.gg/n27xqAaAeV)

<details>
<summary>Nameable styles</summary>

- Normal
- Lazy
- Playful
- Aggressive
- Weak
- Worried
- Pirate
- Crown
- DK

</details>

---

This pack will not work unless the following is done/enabled. 

Go to your:

Options> Video Settings> Quality.

---

Make sure these settings are on:

**Custom entity models: ON**

**Emissive textures: OPTIONAL (ON RECOMMENDED)**

**Random entities: ON**

---

**Optifine is required for the pack to work**

<details>
<summary>License for use</summary>

You can do whatever you want with this texture pack, except:
- Re-upload it on other sites
- Monetize this
- Claim this as your own

</details>
